signals.headline: XRP ETF Inflows Hit Weekly Record | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
XRP ETF Inflows Hit Weekly Record | YES | HIGH confidence**
XRP recorded $119.6 million in net inflows to investment products for the week ending April 11, the strongest weekly figure since December[4]. Seven spot XRP ETFs have reached combined assets under management approaching $1 billion[4].

signals.headline: CLARITY Act Senate Banking Committee Markup | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
CLARITY Act Senate Banking Committee Markup | YES | HIGH confidence**
The CLARITY Act is heading toward a Senate Banking Committee markup vote in late April[1], with endorsements from Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong and US Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent[1]. This regulatory development could allow banks to use XRP directly for liquidity[6].
